title: POST /api/payments/checkout returns 500 Internal Server Error
description: The checkout endpoint crashes with an Internal Server Error when attempting to process payment for a valid order. The order is created successfully, but calling POST /api/payments/checkout with the order ID results in a 500 error. This was introduced in a recent commit that added logging statements to the payment flow.
steps_to_reproduce: Create a new order via POST /api/orders/ with valid items
Note the order_id from the response
Receive 500 Internal Server Error instead of 200 with payment confirmation
error_log: NameError: name 'logging' is not defined in app/routes/payments.py line 62
expected_behavior: Returns 200 with payment confirmation and order status updated to 'paid'
actual_behavior: Returns 500 Internal Server Error. Order status remains 'pending'
recent_changes: Added logging statements to track payment processing events
